title: 弥生賞の後に・生まれた戸惑い

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka performs incredibly at the Yayoi
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, seeing the other racers cry in frustration
at their losses causes her to question her reason
for running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried she won't be able to stay focused or run
well in her distracted state, she requests to
withdraw from the upcoming Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, knowing it's no good to continue
without a goal on the books, I decide to enter her
in the Kobe Shimbun Hai.
